basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Peon, Laboratory Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS), Station Cell Kannur
basic_details.post_name: Laboratory Assistant, Dental Hygienist/Dental Assistant, Peon
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS), Station Cell, Kannur has invited applications for contractual engagement of Laboratory Assistant, Dental Hygienist/Dental Assistant, and Peon at various ECHS Polyclinics under Station Cell Kannur. This is a great opportunity for ex-servicemen and other eligible candidates. The last date to submit applications is 25 July 2026.

qualification.details: Appointment Minimum Qualification Experience Polyclinic & Vacancies Laboratory Assistant DMLT / Class I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces) 5 Years Kanhangad (01) Dental Hygienist / Dental Assistant Diploma in Dental Hygiene / DORA / Class I DH Course (Armed Forces) 5 Years Iritty (01) Peon 8th Class Pass / GD Trade (Armed Forces) 5 Years Kalpetta (01) | Note: Preference will be given to ex-servicemen. Written test will be conducted for Para-Medical staff.

vacancy_details.Minimum Qualification: DMLT / Class I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces)
Diploma in Dental Hygiene / DORA / Class I DH Course (Armed Forces)

post_wise_breakdown.minimum_qualification: DMLT / Class I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces)
Diploma in Dental Hygiene / DORA / Class I DH Course (Armed Forces)

how_to_apply: Download the Application Form from www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the form completely and attach self-attested copies of: Educational qualification certificates Experience certificates PAN Card Aadhaar Card For Ex-Servicemen/Widows: Discharge Book & PPO
Submit the application to: Station Cell (ECHS), C/o DSC Centre, Burnachery (PO), Kannur – 670 013
Applications received after the due date or incomplete will be rejected.
important_instructions: Eligible candidates will be shortlisted and called for interview/written test. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the test/interview. For more details, contact: Phone: 0497-2769191 Email: [email protected] Applications without PAN & Aadhaar copies or experience certificates will be summarily rejected.

Fill the form completely and attach self-attested copies of: Educational qualification certificates Experience certificates PAN Card Aadhaar Card For Ex-Servicemen/Widows: Discharge Book & PPO Submit the application to: Station Cell (ECHS), C/o DSC Centre, Burnachery (PO), Kannur – 670 013 Applications received after the due date or incomplete will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Kannur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 25 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in ECHS Kannur Polyclinic Recruitment?
faq.answer: Total 03 vacancies – Laboratory Assistant (Kanhangad), Dental Hygienist (Iritty), and Peon (Kalpetta).

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for Laboratory Assistant in ECHS Kannur?
faq.answer: DMLT or Class I Lab Tech Course (Armed Forces) with 5 years experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is ex-servicemen preference given in ECHS Polyclinic jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, preference is given to ex-servicemen and widows of ex-servicemen.

faq.question: Q5. Where to submit the application for ECHS Kannur contractual staff?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent to Station Cell (ECHS), C/o DSC Centre, Burnachery (PO), Kannur – 670 013.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Educational certificates, experience proofs, PAN Card, Aadhaar Card, and Discharge Book/PPO (for ex-servicemen).

faq.question: Q7. Will there be a written test for ECHS Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, written test will be conducted for Para-Medical staff (Laboratory Assistant & Dental Hygienist).

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for these ECHS contractual posts?
faq.answer: Remuneration will be as per ECHS norms for contractual staff (not mentioned in advertisement; decided at the time of engagement).

faq.question: Q9. Can civilians apply for Peon post in ECHS Kannur?
faq.answer: Yes, 8th Class passed civilians with 5 years experience can apply.

faq.question: Q10. How to get the application form for ECHS Kannur Polyclinic vacancy?
faq.answer: Download the prescribed format from the official website www.echs.gov.in.
